title: Negative Space
description: First steps in the abstract world. There is exactly enough of everything.

steps.text: The world stopped pretending. What remained was exactly enough: a floor, a light, a direction.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: No cover. No terrain. Nothing to put my back against except all of you.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: It's not empty. It's... finished. Everything extra has been forgiven.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: I can't steal anything here. Everything that exists is load-bearing.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The mana is perfectly still. Like it's waiting for us to say something true.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: So this is the venue. Five of us, one light, no acoustics. Fine. I've played worse.
